notes: Study is about breast cancer patients and physical activity guidelines — not about step count and general population mortality. Removed from references.
AHA Journal URL returned 403; legitimate domain but content unverifiable
Lancet meta-analysis of 15 international cohorts: inverse non-linear dose-response between steps and all-cause mortality; lowest HR at 7000-9000 steps/day — added as primary reference
European J Preventive Cardiology meta-analysis (Banach et al.): 17 cohort studies, 226889 participants; step count inversely associated with all-cause and cardiovascular mortality
